content.problemStatement:
For a concert, the ticket price is determined by reversing all bits of a given 32-bit unsigned integer NNN. Each bit in the original number should be reversed in position (first bit becomes last, second becomes second-last, and so on).


Input Format

First line contains TTT, number of test cases
Next TTT lines each contain a single integer NNN


Output Format

For each test case, print the number obtained after reversing all bits.
